overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy depicting the ascent through a spiral staircase into the Ravenclaw Common Room. The journey transitions from dimly lit stone corridors to a bright, celestial-themed common room with blue decor, Gothic architecture, and student NPCs.

events.description: warm wall sconce lights become visible on the left side of the staircase
lighting shifts to warmer tone as ascending toward the upper landing

agents.ego_description: walking up the spiral staircase, passing framed portraits mounted on the stone walls

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase winding upward through the stone tower
black wrought iron railing with decorative scrollwork
grey stone block walls with vertical wooden wainscoting
oil paintings in gilded frames hanging on the wall
warm glowing lamps mounted on the stone wall
arched stone window with tracery visible ahead on the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a narrow spiral staircase within a stone tower. The walls are lined with framed portraits and illuminated by warm wall sconces. The camera moves steadily upward, revealing Gothic architectural details and maintaining an enclosed, intimate atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden study landing with bookshelves and antique furniture

events.description: exits the stone spiral staircase into a wood-paneled study area
approaches the large wooden door with the eagle knocker

agents.ego_description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the study landing, approaching the Common Room door

entered.detail: dark wood paneling covering the walls of the study area
tall shelves filled with books and artifacts
large terrestrial globe on a wooden stand
heavy wooden door with intricate carvings
round clock with roman numerals on the wooden wall
bronze eagle-shaped door knocker on the wooden door

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the stone staircase into a cozy, wood-paneled study landing filled with bookshelves and antique furniture. The lighting is warm and intimate. The segment ends as the camera approaches the ornate wooden door leading to the Ravenclaw Common Room.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ravenclaw Common Room entry hall with celestial ceiling

events.description: door opens revealing the Ravenclaw Common Room with large eagle statue
dramatic shift to bright natural light streaming through tall Gothic windows

agents.ego_description: entering the common room and ascending the blue carpeted spiral staircase toward the main hall

notable_agents.action: two students in school robes standing near the eagle statue

entered.detail: massive stone eagle sculpture with outstretched wings against the back wall
dark blue ceiling painted with golden constellations and astronomical symbols
spiral staircase covered in deep blue carpet with gold celestial patterns
tall arched windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass
Gothic stone arches framing the entrance to side chambers

segments.scene_description: The door opens to reveal the grand Ravenclaw Common Room entry, dominated by a massive eagle statue and a stunning celestial-painted ceiling. The camera ascends a blue carpeted spiral staircase bathed in natural light from tall Gothic windows, passing two students standing near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ravenclaw Common Room main hall with seating areas

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the main common room floor
camera tilts upward to view the ornate chandelier and ceiling structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room, observing the students and ornate Gothic interior

notable_agents.action: student sitting on a velvet sofa reading a book
group of students gathered around a table studying

entered.detail: classical marble statue of a robed figure in a wall alcove
blue carpet with golden star and constellation patterns covering the floor
plush blue velvet seating arranged around the room
elaborate iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling
floor-to-ceiling Gothic windows with heavy drapery

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into the main common room, a spacious circular hall with blue celestial carpeting and tall Gothic windows flooding the space with natural light. Students are scattered throughout, reading on velvet sofas and studying at tables. The camera explores the perimeter, passing a marble statue in an alcove and looking up at an ornate chandelier.

scene_state.functional_zone: central fireplace area under starry domed ceiling

events.description: moves through archway into the central fireplace area with wooden flooring
camera tilts upward to view the starry domed ceiling above the fireplace

agents.ego_description: approaching the central fireplace and looking up at the celestial dome ceiling

entered.detail: large wooden fireplace structure with a burning fire
polished wooden floor surrounding the fireplace
bronze eagle crest set into the floor in front of the fireplace
domed ceiling painted with stars and astronomical charts
full suit of medieval armor standing guard

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an archway into the central area featuring a large wooden fireplace with a burning fire. The floor transitions to polished wood with a metal eagle emblem. The segment concludes with the camera tilting up to reveal the magnificent starry domed ceiling, showcasing intricate astronomical paintings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from the intimate, dimly lit confines of a stone tower into the expansive, celestial grandeur of the Ravenclaw Common Room. It begins by climbing a narrow spiral staircase lined with portraits and warm sconces, moving steadily upward through the enclosed Gothic architecture. As the camera exits the stairs, the environment shifts into a cozy, wood-paneled study filled with bookshelves before passing through an ornate wooden door. The scene then opens into a bright, airy entry dominated by a massive eagle statue and a blue carpeted staircase, where natural light from tall windows replaces the warm interior glow. Finally, the camera glides through the spacious circular hall past studying students and a marble statue, moving through an archway toward a roaring fireplace before tilting up to reveal a magnificent starry domed ceiling.
